title: Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 is coming soon in Nepal with Intel Core Ultra series 3 CPU

content:
Lenovo is all set to launch its new Legion 5i Gen 11 laptop in Nepal, featuring the Intel Core Ultra 3 CPU. These Legion series laptops are considered among the premium devices that most professional gamers and graphic designers require for color accuracy. This is because they offer high-end gaming performance and a 100% DCI-P3 color gamut. Here, I will discuss everything about this device, including the expected price of the Legion 5i Gen 11 in Nepal, its specifications, and availability. Advertisement Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) Overview Design and Display Starting with the design, Legion 5i Gen 11 has a polycarbonate body with an aluminum lid, as we saw in basic entry-level and mid-range gaming laptops. This laptop is around 1mm thin and 100 grams lighter than its predecessor, the Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 10, making it a more compact, easy-to-carry option. Right now, it comes in the "Eclipse Black " color with a matte finish, making it look pretty premium. The hinge of this laptop can open to 180 degrees, offering a multi-angle view that you can adjust as per your convenience. Moving to the display, this laptop offers a 15.3-inch OLED gaming panel with QHD+ resolution. This should deliver a pretty good visual experience with better contrast and true black than the IPS panel we saw in the previous Legion series. And it also offers a 165Hz refresh rate, which is quite enough for low- to high-level gaming, but some of its competitors, like the Acer Predator Helios Neo 16 , offer a higher 240Hz refresh rate. Similarly, Legion 5i Gen 11 delivers better HDR videos, all thanks to its 1000-nit peak brightness. Here, 100% DCI-P3 color accuracy also makes this guy more useful for the professional looking for a laptop that delivers more precise color. Further, you won't face much risk of eye strain, as it offers low blue-light protection. Performance and Memory Under the hood, the Legion 5i Gen 11 comes with an Intel “ Panther Lake ” Ultra series 3 CPU, specifically Ultra 7 356H and Ultra 9 386H , designed for heavy AAA gaming, high-quality video editing, and multitasking. This CPU offers 16 cores and threads, with three core types that make operations snappier and more responsive in both day-to-day work and multitasking. The integrated cooling fan in this laptop also works really well, maintaining stable CPU performance during heavy tasks such as playing high FPS games. More than that, this laptop has a response time of less than 1ms, which makes it really nice for playing high-paced games. As for the GPU, this laptop features a dedicated NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 or 5060 GPU that should deliver pretty good performance for 1080p gaming, as well as high-quality video editing and multitasking. Here, it offers 8GB of GDDR7 RAM, which might not be sufficient for the user in the long run. In terms of memory, this laptop comes with up to 32GB of DDR5 RAM at 5600 MT/s and up to 2TB of PCIe Gen 4 storage. Here, you also get G-SYNC, which was lacking in the last generation of laptops. Battery and others In terms of battery life, Legion 5i Gen 11 offers almost double the battery life of the previous model, according to testers who have already used it for quite some time. Here, you get an 80 Wh battery paired with a 245W power adapter that lasts about 13-14 hours in casual use. This laptop is also said to offer almost 2 hours of AAA gaming at high resolution. But if you keep the fps at low or medium, you can extend the battery life for more hours on a single charge. In addition, you get a pretty good number of ports that should be enough for the you in both day-to-day use and multitasking. Here, it has different ports, including 1x Thunderbolt 4, 2x USB-C, 3x USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, and 1x RJ45. Along with this, you also get an E-shutter button alongside an audio combo jack. Likewise, Legion 5i Gen 11 offers a 5MP RGB IR webcam with dual microphones, enabling features like Windows Hello and face unlocking. You may also like: Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) Specifications: Dimensions: 344 x 244.5 x 18.95 - 19.95 mm Weight: 1.88 kg Display: 15.3-inch OLED, WQXGA (2560×1600) resolution, 165Hz refresh rate, 100% DCI-P3, HDR 1000 True Black, Low Blue Light CPU Intel Core Ultra 7 356H (16C/16T), 4.70 GHz max boost clock Intel Core Ultra 7 386H (16C/16T), 4.9 GHz max boost clock GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050, 8GB GDDR7 NVIDIA GetForce RTX 5060, 8GB GDDR7 Memory: up to 32GB DDR5 (5600 MT/s) RAM, up to 2TB Gen 4 NVMe SSD storage Ports: 1x Thunderbolt 4, 3x Type-A USB 3.2 Gen1, 1x HDMI 2.1, 2x Type-C USB 3.2 Gen2, 1x RJ45 (LAN) Battery: 80 Wh battery (charges via 245W AC adapter) Webcam: RGB IR (5MP) camera with E-Shutter Audio: Dual Harman speakers with Nahimic Audio (2x 2W) Keyboard: Single-zone RGB backlit Keyboard Touchpad: Windows Precision touchpad Security: TPM 2.0 Also Read : Lenovo Legion Series Price in Nepal Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) Price in Nepal and Availability: Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) has not been officially launched in Nepal, but we expect it to launch very soon here. The Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) with Intel Core Ultra 7 356H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 costs EUR 1,630, whereas the Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) with Intel Core Ultra 9 386H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 costs EUR 2,110. When it launches here, we can expect these laptops with Intel Core Ultra 7 356H and RTX 5050 at NPR 327,259, while Intel Core Ultra 9 386H and RTX 5060 at NPR 423699. Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) Price in Europe (Official) Price in Nepal (Converted) Intel Core Ultra 7 356H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 EUR 1,630 NPR 327,259 Intel Core Ultra 9 386H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 EUR 2,110 NPR 423699 Should you wait for the Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) in Nepal? You should definitely wait for the Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) if you are looking for a premium gaming laptop that is capable of handling not only gaming but also color-precision tasks like graphic design and video editing.

The Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) with Intel Core Ultra 7 356H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 costs EUR 1,630, whereas the Lenovo Legion 5i Gen 11 (2026) with Intel Core Ultra 9 386H and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 costs EUR 2,110. When it launches here, we can expect these laptops with Intel Core Ultra 7 356H and RTX 5050 at NPR 327,259, while Intel Core Ultra 9 386H and RTX 5060 at NPR 423699.
